name.ja: <ruby>熱<rt>ねっ</rt></ruby><ruby>血<rt>けつ</rt></ruby>カラフルボール・パーク

summoning_condition.en: This card's name becomes "Feverous Spirit Stadium" while in the Graveyard.

requirement.en: Activate this card by sending the top 2 cards of your Deck to the Graveyard.

effect.en: While this card is face-up in the Field Zone, this card's name becomes "Feverous Spirit Stadium", neither player can activate Trap Cards when FIRE Attribute monsters declare attacks, and they inflict piercing battle damage.
